name: Nachiket More
summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications, REST APIs, and cloud-deployed systems using React, Django, Node.js, and AWS. Skilled in both frontend and backend development, CI/CD automation, and database design.

info: Built a multi-service data verification pipeline using FastAPI, with an orchestrator managing 6 independent microservices running concurrently and sequentially based on data dependencies.
Integrated OpenAI API across services for structured data extraction, semantic inference, and natural language scoring.
Designed parallel execution in the orchestrator for independent services, reducing end-to-end pipeline latency.
Built React UI components for internal dashboards, focusing on clean state management and reusable components.
Connected frontend features to backend APIs and handled loading, error, and empty states.
Set up CI/CD workflows using Netlify to automatically deploy frontend changes on every merge.
Developed full-stack web features using React and Node.js for consumer-facing applications.
Implemented backend APIs and integrated AWS services including DynamoDB and API Gateway.
Worked on deployment and environment configuration using AWS Amplify for production releases.
Built and styled responsive web pages for client projects.
Assisted in frontend development and cross-browser testing.

publications.title: Comparative Study Of Flight Delay Prediction Using Back Propagation And Radial Basis Function
publications.publisher: International Research Journal of Engineering and Technology (IRJET)

projects.summary: Interactive dashboard with map overlays and MongoDB aggregation pipelines.
info: Built an interactive flight data dashboard with dynamic charts and geographic map overlays.
Designed aggregation pipelines in MongoDB to efficiently query and group large flight datasets by route, airline, and time range.
Architected a REST API layer in Node.js with query filtering, pagination, and response caching.

projects.summary: Full-stack trivia game with Auth0 login, Docker containers, and real-time scoring.
info: Created a full-stack trivia game with user authentication via Auth0 and real-time score tracking.
Containerized frontend and backend services using Docker for consistent local and production environments.
